# 08 — Constraint Authoring

Coming soon. This tutorial shows how to write Python modules whose functions
and classes are translated into the **CONSTRAINT** role, run the forward
pipeline over two versions of the module, and read the ε (epsilon) delta in
the semantic mapping as new constraints are added.

> **Background:** The CONSTRAINT role and the `check_*` / `validate_*` /
> `assert_*` trigger keywords are defined in
> [role assignment](../concepts/role_assignment.md). The translation rules
> that fire on those keywords live in
> [rules/overview.md](../rules/overview.md) and
> [reference/translation_rules.md](../reference/translation_rules.md).

See [related docs](../index.md) for now.
